rulings.Case Title: RICHARD SHAW VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice And Notice Of Motion To Recover Deposited Jury Fees Under Section 631.3
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR THURSDAY, AUGUST 22, 2013 IN DEPARTMENT 503 AT 9:30 A.M., LINE 1, Defendant Enginetech, Inc.¿s motion to recover deposited jury fees under C.C.P. 631.3 is granted. Defendant shall be reimbursed the deposited jury fees plus the $60 fee for filing this motion. There will be no hearing. The court has signed the order and on August 22, 2013 the order will be entered after which defendant may pick up a copy of the order in the Department 503 outbox. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: KEVIN KAVANAUGH et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDENTS et al
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR THURSDAY, AUGUST 22, 2013 IN DEPARTMENT 503 AT 9:30 A.M., LINE 2, Defendant Crown Cork & Seal Company, Inc.¿s motion for summary judgment is continued on the court¿s own motion to August 27, 2013. = (503/TLJ)
